description_long: This is a modern military fighter jet with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a camouflage paint scheme in shades of brown, tan, and white. The aircraft features sharply swept-back wings with underwing pylons, a single vertical stabilizer, and a prominent nose cone. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and is covered by a transparent, gold-tinted canopy. The jet has a single engine exhaust at the rear and is equipped with horizontal stabilizers and small wingtip devices. The overall design suggests high maneuverability and speed, suitable for combat or tactical missions.
description: A camouflaged modern fighter jet with swept-back wings, a single vertical stabilizer, and a forward-positioned cockpit under a gold-tinted canopy.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical swept-back wings.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the elongated fuselage, single engine exhaust, and the camouflage pattern along the body and wings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine exhaust, twin horizontal stabilizers, and the full span of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile with clear visibility of the wing and tail configuration, as well as the cockpit placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and small wingtip devices; no visible dihedral or anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single rear-mounted jet engine with visible exhaust nozzle.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear; main and nose gear units are implied but not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a gold-tinted bubble canopy.
